ul.li: Reallocation on growth copies ALL data
Adding entities: just allocate new chunk
No expensive memcpy of thousands of entities
16KB chunk fits in L1 cache (32KB typical)

g.text: for (Chunk* chunk = arch->first; chunk; chunk = chunk->next) {

text.tspan: // Next chunk loads fresh into L1 cache
// Next chunk loads fresh into L1 cache

g.text: Total: ~14KB per chunk (fits L1 with room for code)
